name: Maison Éclat
description: European luxury fashion house focused on editorial campaigns and premium seasonal collections.
targetAudience: Affluent style-conscious adults 25-44 in urban markets
campaignObjectives: Drive high-intent awareness and premium product consideration through aspirational storytelling

name: Apex Devices
description: Consumer electronics brand launching flagship devices with creator-first review programs.
campaignObjectives: Increase launch-week conversions via trusted creator reviews and comparison content

name: Lumière Labs
description: Science-led skincare brand specializing in dermatologist-inspired routines and clean formulations.
targetAudience: Women 20-40 interested in skincare education and ingredient transparency
campaignObjectives: Grow trial-to-repeat purchase through routine-based creator education

name: Forge Nutrition
description: Performance nutrition brand for athletes and gym-focused lifestyle creators.
targetAudience: Fitness-focused adults 18-34 pursuing strength and endurance goals
campaignObjectives: Drive supplement subscriptions and gym-community advocacy

name: EcoVault
description: Sustainable home and lifestyle products with carbon-conscious supply chain messaging.
campaignObjectives: Increase brand trust and repeat purchases through impact storytelling

name: Axis Collective
description: Streetwear label blending urban culture, limited drops, and music crossover collaborations.
targetAudience: Gen Z and young millennials in street culture communities
campaignObjectives: Build hype around limited releases and community-driven brand heat

name: Volta Kitchen
description: Smart kitchen appliance brand focused on creator-led recipe content and product demos.
campaignObjectives: Increase product demos and ecommerce conversion through recipe integrations

name: Nexus Finance
description: FinTech platform for investing education, budgeting tools, and creator-led financial literacy.
targetAudience: Young professionals 22-38 building wealth and financial confidence
campaignObjectives: Drive qualified app installs with compliant educational creator content
